failure.message: pydantic_core._pydantic_core.ValidationError: 1 validation error for UnifiedQueryResponse cost.model_cost Field required [type=missing, input_value={'model_used': 'cached', 'total_cost': 0.0}, input_type=dict] For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.11/v/missing
